narrative:
Knox Twp township has 2,645 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.6 percentage points.
